evidence_boundary: Repository diff and exact-head CI only; no external evidence promotion.
trajectories: five-image CI build failed before diagnostic directory existed
build_start -> per-image log -> artifact on failure
artifact upload is not evidence unless the diagnostic path exists before risky work
production compose reused Manager image for Model Gateway
command drift hidden by shared image
five services require five inspectable image identities
Caddy OCI label declared edge while manifest required caddy
service name and runtime identity need one contract
smoke accepted running containers with health none
rollback retagged prior images to rollback and set floating SHA
verified manifest -> exact prior refs -> exact prior SHA
rollback is a new operation on an old exact release, not a new floating release
prior manifest hashes and DB head -> rollback eligibility
manual compatibility labels are not proof
before accepted state -> rollback -> after accepted state equality
successful smoke alone cannot prove safe rollback
backup omitted database and secret-version continuity
backup ID -> DB + filesystem + release + secret refs
filesystem archive is not whole-product backup
restore did not require proof refinding
restore result -> durable proof lookup -> verified
data exists but accepted work cannot be proven
vanilla PostgreSQL lacked managed Supabase auth/storage bootstrap
blank PostgreSQL -> Supabase-compatible test substrate -> immutable app ledger
migration evidence confused with platform provisioning
test substrate and managed acceptance are separate classes
migration 0078 fixed conflict namespace but UPDATE still collided
RETURNS TABLE namespace -> qualified conflict and update references
source review missed a second namespace surface
integration suites shared fixed identities and global queues
test file -> isolated identities or isolated database -> cleanup
serial execution alone does not isolate durable identities
platform support adapter authorized session and lease but dropped them from command payload
authorized actor context -> durable command payload -> DB trigger
legitimate admin command denied or context not auditable
pre-dispatch authorization must survive durable registration
exact-head PostgreSQL aggregate now passes through migration 0079
local PostgreSQL proves SQL behavior, not managed platform acceptance
source, focused, governance, typecheck, lint, broad unit and workspace build green on same head
documentation or cleanup can invalidate exact head
CI signing uses ephemeral key and external fingerprint verification
trusted production key custody and rotation
CI mechanics mistaken for production signing authority
cryptographic verification and trusted signer acceptance are separate
